title: Operator Runbooks & Internal Docs Hub
description: Searchable index of operator runbooks, SOPs, internal documentation, and governance references. Content sourced from docs/runbooks/ and docs/reference/. Operator question: 'What is the documented procedure for this platform operation?' Read-only with respect to documentation content — editing is a git workflow, not an in-console operation. No VistA equivalent — platform-native documentation surface.

dataSources.description: Runbook and SOP index sourced from docs/runbooks/ and docs/reference/ with search and workflow tracking.
